channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Jones, Jackson move to Republican primary run-off in Georgia governor race
item.description: Burt Jones and Rick Jackson will face each other again in the June 16 run-off.

item.title: Daughter honours security guard father killed while protecting mosque
item.description: The daughter of mosque security guard Amin Abdullah is remembering him as the “absolute best dad in the world.”

item.title: Fear grips eastern DR Congo amid deadly Ebola outbreak
item.description: From Bukavu to Kinshasa, concern is spreading among residents and street vendors as Ebola cases rise.

item.title: Arsenal fans erupt after team secures Premier League crown
item.description: Arsenal has won the Premier League, ending a 22-year drought.

item.title: China’s Xi Jinping, Russian President Vladimir Putin hold talks in Beijing
item.description: Xi and Putin hold talks just days after US President Donald Trump made an official visit to China.

item.title: Republican Thomas Massie who stood up to Trump defeated in Kentucky primary
item.description: With an estimated 72 percent of the vote counted, Ed Gallrein led with 54.4 percent to Massie’s 45.6 percent.

item.title: Bodies of Italian divers recovered from cave in Maldives
item.description: The bodies of two of five Italian divers who died in a deep underwater cave in the Maldives have been recovered.

item.title: Nigeria says joint US strikes kill 175 ISIL fighters in country’s northeast
item.description: Nigerian Army lauds joint US operation as part of ongoing military campaign to 'hunt down and kill terrorists anywhere'.

item.title: US President Trump, family granted immunity from pending tax audits
item.description: Democratic lawmakers blast move, which follows the establishment of a controversial 'Anti-Weaponization Fund'.

item.title: Vance: US ‘locked and loaded’ for military action if Iran talks fail
item.description: US Vice President JD Vance says the US is prepared to take military action if Iran does not agree to a nuclear deal

item.title: US Senate advances resolution to curb Trump’s power to wage war on Iran
item.description: Vote to advance War Powers Resolution seen as rare rebuke of the president as pressure grows to end US attack on Iran.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran warns US of ‘surprises’; Xi, Putin meet in Beijing
item.description: Warning comes after Trump threatened military action against Iran and gave it 'two to three days' to strike a deal.

item.title: Putin meets Xi: Why Russia and China need each other
item.description: Vladimir Putin’s arrival was announced just a day after United States President Donald Trump left Beijing.

item.title: US to let DR Congo football team in for World Cup despite Ebola restrictions
item.description: The US has banned non-Americans who have visited DR Congo, Uganda or South Sudan in the last 21 days from entry.

item.title: US authorities say missionary who contracted Ebola en route to Germany
item.description: World Health Organization says death toll from outbreak has risen to 134, as experts warn of continued challenges.

item.title: Thousands of protesters demand president’s resignation in Bolivia’s La Paz
item.description: Bolivia faces its worst economic crisis in 40 years, fueling nationwide protests demanding the president's resignation.

item.title: NAACP urges athletes to boycott southern US universities over voting rights
item.description: Organisation calls for Black athlete fan boycott over Supreme Court's Voting Rights Act ruling, southern redistricting.

item.title: Video shows oil spill on Iranian island after refinery attack last month
item.description: The impact of an oil spill caused by an attack on Iran’s Lavan refinery last month has been revealed.

item.title: Arsenal’s Arteta claims Premier League to step from Guardiola’s shadow
item.description: Mikel Arteta was Pep Guardiola's assistant at Man City, but has pipped his former tutor to the Premier League title.

item.title: Trump showcases new ‘drone-protected’ White House ballroom
item.description: US President Donald Trump has given reporters a tour around the construction site of his White House ballroom.

item.title: Arsenal crowned Premier League champions as Man City draw at Bournemouth
item.description: Arsenal's 22-year wait for a Premier League title ends as Manchester City draw 1-1 at Bournemouth.

item.title: More than 15,800 people killed in Russia’s all-out war on Ukraine: UN
item.description: Nearly 800 children are among those killed in Ukraine since Russia's full-scale invasion in February 2022, the UN says.

item.title: Norway journalist calls out Modi over avoiding media questions
item.description: A Norwegian reporter asked Narendra Modi why he wouldn’t speak to the media after a press conference in Oslo on Monday.

item.title: Does Ukraine have the advantage at the moment?
item.description: Kyiv takes the war deeper into Russia with a huge attack on the Moscow region.

item.title: Southampton expelled from world’s most lucrative football match for spying
item.description: Southampton out of EFL championship playoff final after spying on Middlesbrough, who face Hull for Premier League place.
